p.strong: Technical Specification: Jumps, Basic Blocks, and Edge Transitions

div.p: In Bytecode-based VMs, high-level control structures (while, for, if) are erased. The reconstruction relies on identifying:

ol.li: Entry Points: Targets of any jump instruction.
Exit Points: Instructions immediately preceding a jump or a jump itself.

div.p: This diagram maps the raw linear memory of .text to the non-linear execution graph utilized by the JIT compiler and Optimizer.

ol.li: Basic Block (BB): Maximal sequence of instructions with one entry/exit.
Dominance: B1 dominates B2 because every path from Entry to B2 must pass through B1.
Natural Loop: Formed by the {B2->B1} back-edge.
